title: Tangy Indian Tomatoes Fritters
description: Crispy, garlicky tomato fritters with a tangy twist, perfect for a brunch‑style snack.
instructions: Drain the canned tomatoes and set aside.
In a bowl whisk together chickpea flour, all-purpose flour, rice flour, cumin, coriander, salt and pepper until well mixed.
Add minced garlic, grated ginger, chopped herbs, lemon juice and the drained tomatoes; stir until a thick batter forms.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat until shimmering.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, flattening slightly to form fritters about 2 inches across.
Fry each side for 2 to 3 minutes until golden brown and crispy.
Remove fritters onto paper towels to drain excess oil.
Arrange fritters in a single layer on parchment paper for a papillote effect, if desired.
Serve hot with a squeeze of lime or a dollop of yogurt-based chutney.
Garnish with extra herbs and enjoy.
